description: Grey and red backpackOne padded haul loop, padded adjustable shoulder straps and a padded back with mesh detailingTwo main zip compartments, one has a padded laptop sleeve with Velcro closure and the other has one slip pocket and pen holdersTwo external zip pocketsOne zip pocket on the side and one open pocket on the other sidePadded backPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty: 6 months against manufacturing defects
